# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Define services for log collection, storage, and visualization. Configure Logstash pipelines for log parsing. Expose Kibana UI and Elasticsearch ports for access. This is for our centralized logging platform.
# Category: elasticsearch_logs_exposed

Docker Container Configurations
version: '3'
services:
    es01:
        image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.6.2
        container_name: es01
        environment:
          - xpack.license.self_generated.type=trial
          - xpack.security.enabled=false
          - xpack.monitoring.enabled=false
          - bootstrap.memory_lock=true # along with the memlock settings below, this makes the container much more secure against oomkills: https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/7.x/docker.html#containers-mem
          - cluster.name=es-cluster
          - bootstrap.system_call_filter=false # disabling this exes its like 5% of mem usage (like when it was enabled)
          - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms2g -Xmx2g" # minimum and maximum heap size
        volumes:
            - esdata01:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
            #- /home/$USER:/tmp
        ports:
            - 9200:9200
volumes:
    esdata01:
        driver: local
    esdata02:
        driver: local
Kibana Configurations
version: '3'
services:
  kibana765:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana-oss:7.9.3
    container_name: kibana765
    environment:
      ELASTICSEARCH_URL: http://es01:9200 #change this to the actual address
    depends_on: 
      - es01
    ports: 
      - 8480:5601
